modular submarine construction (Quonset Point / Newport News)
fracture toughness of rubber and steel

stainless steel grade designations (UNS, AISI, ISO)
stress corrosion cracking and chloride sensitivity

notes: This is the second of five videos in the Summer 2016 Corrosion series. Lecture opens mid-discussion (Tom is finishing an answer about aluminum specs from the prior session or prior moment).
Lecture functions partly as a recitation — Tom brings in the new Nalco book and uses its figures to reinforce content from the previous day's lecture.

The surgical-scissors anecdote (p39) is a reuse of the same case Tom tells in lec11 §1 of the worked example (different course, different year). The price figures and details differ slightly — this is Tom's recurring teaching case on insurance overhead in medical products.
Sentence-level garbles in the student turns (p18 Brian, p41 catapult-psi student) are flagged for editorial register review at layer 3.
